reviews.review_description:
UPDATE-   Ok, finally got lucky and accidentally hit the dart board (pure random luck should never be a factor in progressing in your games devs..), but IMMEDIATELY, the next challenge is once again pushing the boundaries of what this game is designed to handle... You have to jump between nearly invisible TINY platforms that keep getting higher and much smaller as you go. The last one is maybe the size of a shoe, and you have ZERO way to look down whilst jumping to better control where you are landing. Why? Because the developers had the bright odea of putting a huge circle under you that overlaps anything and everything in-game (seriously... why?).
This ridiculous platforming is maybe 20 minutes tops into the game if going very slowly, and going by these issues existing in all of their older games I don't believe this is ever being fixed and will do nothing but get much worse as the game progresses (not that I'd be able to get past this ill-concieved platforming,nor have the patience to put up with continuously trying over and over for 20+ minutes more..). 
So with that, though I hate to say it- I just want a refund. Everyone else should save their money as well.

OG-   I went ahead and purchased the triple pack bundle for all 3 games since I enjoyed the trials enough. But 3 things that bugged me even during the free trials that's in ALL 3 of these games because thr developer apparently refuses to even try to make their games any better after all of this time, is the facts that 1- you are stuck with snap-turning. ZERO settings to change this or to change anything at all (there's literally not even a Settings menu anywhere in any of the games)... This is odd, and I have zero idea why the devs would do this.
2-  You have a huge circle of sloppy colors directly under you that's supposed to represent a body. It doesn't do that at all though... What it DOES do is cover EVERYTHING it touches, making literally everything you get close to IMPOSSIBLE to see if it's anywhere under your chest level. Again.. WHY do this?! IN ALL 3 GAMES, as if you guys think this is something that actually works or adds to your games...

So outside of those issues that plague all 3 titles and will seemingly never get updated and fixed (no pride in your work I guess..), this game specifically showed huge issues with physics. I got to the part where I need to throw adart at a dart board..  Simple enough in a well made game or real life. Here? I throw (in every way I could think to try) and the dart just flutters about in an odd way and hits the ground. 
You guys ARE NOT"ForeVR Darts" and did not make an engine that can handle this... 
So I'm likely stuck here this early in the game, so will inevitably request a refund it seems.

I can't say I recommend this game, because for 5 to 10 more dollars you can get 1 of many great puzzlers in VR that have more care put into them and actually get updates (plus they don't REQUIRE you to be online even when you are playing Single Player...).
So avoid these titles.
